## Summary

Describe the user-visible and technical change.

## Workflow checks

- [ ] Linked to the parent feature or task issue
- [ ] Milestone impact reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated or marked not needed
- [ ] Tests updated or marked not needed
- [ ] Rollout or migration impact reviewed

## Notes for reviewers

Call out anything that affects readiness, dependencies, or release planning.
